title: b9691
description: ggml-cpu: Conditionally enable power11 backend based on compiler support ( #24687 ) ggml: Conditionally enable power11 backend based on compiler support Guard POWER11 backend creation behind a compiler flag check for -mcpu=power11. This avoids build failures on current GCC/Clang toolchains while preserving forward compatibility once POWER11 support becomes available. title: b9689
description: metal : add f16 and bf16 support for concat operator ( #24724 ) metal : add f16 and bf16 support for concat operator Extend the Metal backend concat operator to support f16 and bf16 tensor types in addition to the existing f32 and i32 support.
